Asunción, Paraguay · Est. 2014

Paraguay
To the
World

A Paraguayan production company. We develop, produce, and finance our films, from first draft to international market, built on three decades of capital markets discipline and a lifelong obsession with cinema.

02.

In Development

7 Features · 3 Docs · 3 Series · 1 Short
Feature Film · Fiction
Maldecidos
Horror / Supernatural Thriller
Dir. Hugo Cardozo  ·  Co-prod. Murdoc (Uruguay)  ·  FONDEC · INAP · Ibermedia
A young garbage collector's life spirals into a terrifying nightmare when he and his friend discover a cursed, unopenable wooden box, unleashing a demonic entity bent on destroying him and everyone he loves.
Feature Film · Fiction
ALI
Historical Drama / Fantasy
In the depths of the Paraguayan jungle, amid an unequal war, the spirit of the land awakens within Ali, and demands vengeance.
Feature Film · Fiction
Mamá No Me Dio Permiso
Coming-of-Age Drama
A repressed teenage girl navigating a new school and first crushes, until the arrival of her older, gothic cousin upends everything her strict mother has forbidden.
Feature Film · Fiction
El Crack
Comedy / Fantasy
After a magical encounter with an indigenous shaman, a young man gets his wish of becoming a football star, and must choose between glory and his soul.
Feature Film · Fiction
El Rey Vikingo de Paraguay
Action / Thriller
A journalist posing as a military colonel infiltrates a secured crime scene, determined to uncover the truth behind two murdered soldiers and a mysterious captive girl.
Feature Film · Fiction
El Payaso
Thriller / Crime Drama
An aging, impoverished clown, haunted by tragedy and broken by humiliation, finally snaps and descends into a violent spiral of murder and kidnapping.
Feature Film · Fiction
Curitiba
Drama
A son reluctantly drives his sick mother a thousand kilometres from Asunción to Curitiba to retrieve furniture from his grandparents' apartment, a journey that becomes a reckoning with three generations of exile.
Short Film · Fiction
¡Shot, Shot, Shot!
Thriller / Dark Comedy

Three bridesmaids, a rideshare, a rainy night, and a phone that records everything. Nobody walks away clean.

Documentary
Raúl Vicente Amarilla
Sports Documentary
The life and career of footballer Raúl Vicente Amarilla, his legendary run with Olimpia and his lasting impact on South American football.
Documentary
Angelitos de Cateura
Documentary
In the Cateura landfill, marginalized women and recyclers return dignity to the most forgotten, transforming pain into a sacred act of love and humanity.
Documentary
Beyond the Fear: A Life in the Paranormal
Documentary / Psychological / Supernatural
The grandson of Ed and Lorraine Warren reveals the true force behind what haunts us.
Vertical Series
Romance / College Drama
En el Nombre del Amor
Two university students try to keep their relationship alive, unaware a mysterious observer is tracking their every move.
Teen / Coming-of-Age Romance
Después del Cole
A teenager must find the courage to confess his feelings to his best friend, without destroying everything between them.
Comedy
Allá No Es Así
An aspiring comedian leaves his disapproving mother to chase his dreams in the city, only to find a tiny apartment and an eccentric, chain-vaping roommate.
03.

Built from Cinema

If you know The Big Lebowski, you already know where this is going. In the 1998 Coen Brothers film, the "Little Lebowski Urban Achievers" are inner-city children of promise without the necessary means for a higher education. It is, in the film, largely a front. We are not.

Urban Achievers S.A. was born from a conversation between a father and a son for whom that film is not just a favorite, but a shared language, and for whom cinema is not a hobby but a lifelong obsession. We develop stories, produce films, and stay in the room from first draft to final cut. This is not a fund. It is a production company built by people who love film the way others love breathing.

We also bring something uncommon to this industry: decades of experience in capital markets, financial structuring, and enterprise development. We understand every stage, development, financing, production, exhibition, and sales, and we apply that discipline without apology. We are supported by leading professionals in finance, banking, legal, accounting, and compliance. Not dreamers. Serious practitioners who happen to be obsessed with great cinema.

And where we can, we bring emerging talent into the process, not as charity, but as collaborators. Talent is not scarce in this region. Access is.

04.

Principals & Collaborators
René Ruiz Díaz
President · Producer
WhatsApp

Film producer, serial entrepreneur, former vice president of a Fortune 100 multinational, capital markets investor and executive. Formed in business administration. Founding partner of Urban Achievers S.A.

Gonzalo Ruiz Díaz
Director · Producer
WhatsApp

Director and producer. Formed in cinematography at the University of California, Los Angeles. Leads creative production, and is developing his own projects as writer, producer and director. Also, in charge of the shorts and vertical series unit of the company.

Professional Support

Urban Achievers is backed by a network of leading professionals across financial advisory, investment banking, accounting, legal, regulatory compliance, and corporate governance, the same caliber of expertise that underpins any serious institutional operation. By design, a 360-degree company.

05.

Why Paraguay

Young. Entrepreneurial. Open.

Paraguay is one of South America's best-kept secrets. A fast-growing economy, a government that facilitates rather than obstructs, and a film environment that rewards ambition. This is not just where we are. It is why we can do what we do.

Young
Population
A young, entrepreneurial country with a growing appetite for storytelling, talent, and creative industry.
Low
Taxes & Costs
Corporate tax: 10%. Personal income tax: 10%. VAT: 10%. The lowest unified tax structure of any major economy in the Americas. Production costs follow.
Open
Economy
Investment grade sovereign ratings. A business-friendly environment built for growth, with strong institutional and legal frameworks.
World
Class Talent
Access to exceptional cast and crews with a culture of professionalism, commitment, and genuine passion for the craft.

On set, Paraguay delivers. Cast and crews who arrive prepared and invested. Locations that range from dense jungle to colonial streets to raw urban landscapes. A public sector that understands the value of the creative industry and works with us, not against us.

Beyond production, Paraguay is simply a great place to live, create, and build a business. The quality of life is high, the pace is human, and the opportunity is real. For filmmakers, entrepreneurs, and international co-production partners, the case is clear.

Paraguay is not just where we are. It is why we can do what we do.
